cit.basis: IUE (Impuesto sobre las Utilidades de las Empresas, Ley 843): flat 25% on annual net taxable profits.
cit.note: Financial sector pays an additional AA-IUE of 25% on profits when return on equity (ROE) exceeds 6% (excess-profitability surtax on banks and insurance). Mining bears an additional IUE surtax of 12.5% (price-linked rules can raise the combined additional burden up to 25%); hydrocarbons have their own additional regime (IDH and royalties). Surtaxes are out of scope for this SME estimator.

it_transactions_tax.note: IT (Impuesto a las Transacciones): 3% on gross receipts of each transaction; IUE effectively paid can be credited against IT in the following year.

vat.note: IVA is 13% charged inside the price (tax-inclusive base), which is an effective 14.94% on the net-of-tax price (0.13 / 0.87).

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ (IUE year-ends vary by sector).

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
AA-IUE financial surtax, mining/hydrocarbons surtaxes, IT crediting mechanics, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
